description_long: This object is a lush potted plant featuring broad, glossy green leaves radiating outward from a central stem. The plant is housed in a tall, sleek, black rectangular pot with a smooth finish and sharp edges. At the center, a single white spathe flower emerges, characteristic of the Peace Lily, adding a striking contrast to the deep green foliage. The leaves are large, slightly curved, and have prominent veins, giving the plant a vibrant and healthy appearance. The pot appears to be made of plastic or ceramic, with no visible decorative patterns or embellishments. This type of plant is commonly used as an ornamental feature in modern indoor or semi-outdoor urban environments.
description: A vibrant Peace Lily with broad green leaves and a single white flower, set in a tall, sleek black rectangular pot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white flower and the symmetrical spread of glossy green leaves in a tall black pot.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the foliage and the angled position of the flower above the pot.
description_view_2: Rear view with the leaves overlapping and the flower partially obscured, emphasizing the plant's fullness.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wide span of the leaves and the flower angled away from the viewer.
